name: Nord Insuretech Group AB
summary: Nord Insuretech Group AB operates a digital platform that allows users and partners to sell various insurance products in Norway. Its platform operates as an intermediary that delivers digital and white-label solutions to consumers and businesses. The company was formerly known as Hudya AB (publ) and changed its name to Nord Insuretech Group AB in January 2021. Nord Insuretech Group AB was founded in 2016 and is based in Stockholm, Sweden.
